noted.summary: CISA KEV remediation deadline TOMORROW March 30, 2026. Unauthenticated RCE in F5 BIG-IP AMP. Federal agencies must remediate or discontinue. No new public PoC this cycle.

noted.product: Coruna / DarkSword iOS Exploit Kit (Operation Triangulation Evolution)
noted.summary: Kaspersky Securelist (via SecurityAffairs March 26) confirmed Coruna uses updated version of the Operation Triangulation kernel exploit. Five exploit chains, 23 total exploits targeting iOS 13.0-17.2.1, all patched in iOS 18.4.1. GTIG confirmed UNC6353 (watering hole) and UNC6691 (Chinese financial TA) usage. Finding fully reported across prior cycles; removing from active monitoring queue.

Dutch researcher disclosed API key exposure enabling access to 300K fan accounts, transfer of 42K season tickets, modification of 538 stadium bans. All patched; DPA and police notified. No malicious exploitation. Low operational relevance.
Successful phishing against Dutch Police internal systems (March 27). No citizen data or operational data exposed. DPA notified. Limited impact documented for completeness.
Third cycle unable to access full report content (URL variants 404). Key headline: 'attack cycle accelerating.' Retry with direct PDF URL next morning cycle.
